checks.name: State Independence
checks.notes: Skill is fully stateless. Context preserved through physical artifacts (CAPABILITY_MAP.md, DECOMPOSITION_PLAN.md, DELEGATION_MANIFEST.md, EXECUTION_LOG.md, FINAL_ASSEMBLY.md).

checks.name: Artifact Gating
checks.notes: Every transition requires the preceding artifact. MONITOR depends on DELEGATION_MANIFEST.md.

checks.name: Intent Preservation
checks.notes: Mandatory 'context' in CAPABILITY_MAP.md and FINAL_ASSEMBLY.md. 'tradeoffs_rejected' in DECOMPOSITION_PLAN.md.

checks.name: Loop Breakers
checks.notes: max_retries: 3 in YAML frontmatter. Explicit timeout and conflict transitions to Wait-For-Human.

checks.name: Physical Execution Standards
checks.notes: MONITOR tracks execution status from delegated skills. CRITIC verifies completeness against DECOMPOSITION_PLAN.md.

checks.name: Single-File Format
checks.notes: YAML frontmatter combined with Markdown body in SKILL.md.

checks.name: Composite Personas
checks.notes: Clearly defined: Analyst (Scout), Strategist (Decompose), Dispatcher (Delegate), Controller (Monitor), Integrator (Assemble), Senior Orchestrator (Critic).

checks.name: Graceful Degradation
checks.notes: Conflict and timeout escalation paths. Escalation over guessing is a core directive.

checks.name: Separation of Concerns
checks.notes: YAML handles routing logic; Markdown handles cognitive instructions.

checks.name: Agent Agnosticism
checks.notes: Orchestration logic is tool-based and artifact-driven. No reliance on specific LLM features.
